name: PriceLabs Dynamic Pricing API
what_it_does: PriceLabs REST API for dynamic pricing and revenue management for short-term rentals. Enables AI agents to retrieve AI-generated price recommendations for vacation rental properties, sync pricing data to OTA channels (Airbnb, VRBO, Booking.com), access market data and demand signals, manage base prices and minimum stay rules, and optimize revenue across rental portfolios.
use_cases: Syncing AI-generated price recommendations to OTA listings from revenue management agents
Retrieving market demand data for pricing strategy agents
Automating minimum stay rule adjustments from occupancy optimization agents
Integrating pricing analytics with property management workflows from PMS agents
not_for: Hotel revenue management without short-term rental focus
Commercial real estate pricing without OTA channel sync needs
Fixed-price rental operations without dynamic pricing requirements
best_when: A vacation rental operator or property manager wants AI agents to automate dynamic pricing decisions based on market demand, seasonality, and competitor data through their PMS integrations.
avoid_when: FINANCIAL RISK: Automated pricing errors can result in underpricing (lost revenue) or overpricing (lost bookings). Always validate pricing rules before applying to live listings.

auth.notes: PriceLabs uses API key authentication. Keys are account-scoped and provide access to all properties in the account. Available on Pro and higher plans.

pricing.free_tier_limits: 30-day free trial; API access on Pro plans
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-listing monthly pricing; market data dashboards available separately
pricing.notes: US company, Chicago-founded. Leading dynamic pricing tool for vacation rentals with 400K+ active listings. Integrates with 110+ PMS and channel managers.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; documented in API docs

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK: Pricing errors directly impact booking revenue — validate rules carefully
No public MCP server — REST API with API key auth
No webhooks — must poll for updated price recommendations
API access only on paid Pro plans — not available on basic tier
No granular scopes — API key grants full account access to all properties
Price recommendations are ML-generated — understand model assumptions before automating
agent_readiness.security_notes: Revenue and pricing data for rental properties. SOC2. API key with no scopes — full account access. No webhooks requires polling.

security_score_components.security_notes: Pricing and revenue data. SOC2. API key only, no scopes. US data residency.
